books.title: With Fire and Sword
books.author: Henryk Sienkiewicz
books.summary: A Cossack uprising in 17th century Poland threatens the entire Commonwealth.

books.title: The Lone Wolf
books.author: Louis Joseph Vance
books.summary: A skilled thief, pursued for his past crimes, is faced with a choice between love or a life of crime.

books.title: The Story of My Life
books.author: Helen Keller
books.summary: Helen Keller writes about her experiences as a deafblind child learning to communicate.

books.title: Recollections of Full Years
books.author: Helen Herron Taft
books.summary: Helen Herron Taft, wife of William Howard Taft, the twenty-seventh President of the United States, recalls her life married to one of America’s most influential political figures.

books.title: The Mystery of Cabin Island
books.author: Franklin W. Dixon
books.summary: A group of amateur detectives unravel the mystery of a missing stamps collection.

books.title: School Stories
books.author: P. G. Wodehouse
books.summary: A collection of Wodehouse’s school stories about the lives and adventures of schoolboys in the early 1900s.

books.title: The Tragical History of Doctor Faustus
books.author: Christopher Marlowe
books.summary: Dr. Faustus sells his soul to Lucifer in return for magical powers.

books.title: The Roots of the Mountains
books.author: William Morris
books.summary: The peoples of the dales and woods must unite to defeat a foe intent on enslaving them.

books.title: The Jade God
books.author: Alan Sullivan
books.summary: Two years after a mysterious murder, a brother and sister move into a countryside manor and begin to notice strange occurrences.

books.title: At the Mountains of Madness
books.author: H. P. Lovecraft
books.summary: An Antarctic expedition reveals the horrifying reality of ancient myths in the depths of the continent.

books.title: Essays
books.author: Henry David Thoreau
books.summary: A collection of Henry David Thoreau’s essays.

books.title: The Roman Hat Mystery
books.author: Ellery Queen
books.summary: A police detective and his son attempt to solve the murder of a man attending a play at the theater.

books.title: The Autobiography of Benjamin Franklin
books.author: Benjamin Franklin
books.summary: Benjamin Franklin writes about his youth, adventures, and achievements.

books.title: Dialogues
books.author: Plato
books.summary: A collection of Plato’s dialogues.

books.title: Magnolia Leaves
books.author: Mary Weston Fordham
books.summary: A collection of poems by Mary Weston Fordham.

books.title: Dodsworth
books.author: Sinclair Lewis
books.summary: A newly-retired businessman’s peaceful European trip falls apart as his wife chases high European society.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Henry Kuttner
books.summary: A collection of short fiction by Henry Kuttner, ordered by date of original publication.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: R. A. Lafferty
books.summary: A collection of science fiction and fantasy stories by R. A. Lafferty ordered by date of publication.

books.title: A Confession
books.author: Leo Tolstoy
books.summary: A brief meditation on depression, philosophy, religion, and the meaning of life.

books.title: The Giant Raft
books.author: Jules Verne
books.summary: A former slave trader with an encrypted note schemes about its meaning, while a man with a secret past travels with his family down the Amazon in a giant raft to attend his daughter’s wedding.
